title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF GABONG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF PanDANAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO TUAN HADJI JIAKARIA GENERAL COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 8762 / 61 OG No. 4, 365 (January 25, 1965)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4046, June 18, 1964 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF GABONG COMMUNITY SCHOOL IN THE BARRIO OF PanDANAN, MUNICIPALITY OF BALABAC, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN, TO TUAN HADJI JIAKARIA GENERAL COMMUNITY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Gabong Community School in the barrio of Pandanan, Municipality of Balabac, Province of Palawan, is hereby changed to Tuan Hadji Jiakaria General Community School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June. 18, 1964.
